ground_truth.description: Photo of Rathaus in Vienna. Facade very unique, should easily get. From Christmas market in square (not obvious).
ground_truth.photographer_description: A photo of the Rathaus in Vienna. The facade is very unique so it should easily be able to get this. It is taken from the Christmas market in the square in front, but this is not obvious. Nighttime, but the building is lit up.

entities.name: Vienna Rathaus
entities.notes: City Hall

details.description: Nighttime view of Vienna’s City Hall (Wiener Rathaus) illuminated with warm floodlighting. The Neo‑Gothic facade features pointed arches, ornate tracery, arcades, pinnacles, and a very tall central clock tower with glowing blue clock faces. In the foreground is a bustling Christmas market with wooden chalet-style stalls decorated with string lights. A very large, decorated Christmas tree stands to the left of the building, and luminous snowflake-shaped decorations hang in front of the facade. The scene is crowded and festive, photographed from a low angle in the square directly in front of the Rathaus.

details.description: Night-time view of Vienna's Rathaus (City Hall) at Rathausplatz. The Neo-Gothic building dominates the scene with its ornate stone façade, multiple slender spires, and a tall central clock tower illuminated against the dark sky. Warm architectural lighting highlights the arched windows, tracery, and pinnacles along the façade. In the foreground, a festive Christmas market scene unfolds: wooden stalls with peaked roofs, strings of fairy lights, garlands, and a sizeable decorated Christmas tree to the left. The market atmosphere is bustling with people, suggesting a holiday atmosphere surrounding the iconic municipal building.

details.description: A low-angle night photograph capturing the illuminated façade of the Vienna City Hall (Wiener Rathaus). The building exhibits striking Neo-Gothic architecture, characterized by a soaring central tower with a clock face, flanked by four smaller turrets, pointed arches, and intricate stone tracery. The structure is bathed in warm artificial light against a pitch-black sky. To the left of the frame stands a large Christmas tree decorated with red ornaments and white lights. In the immediate foreground, the wooden stalls of the Christkindlmarkt (Christmas market) are visible, adorned with festive string lights, with a crowd of people gathering below, indicating a festive holiday atmosphere.

details.description: A night photograph of the Vienna City Hall (Wiener Rathaus) in Austria, showcasing its grand Neo-Gothic architecture. The central tower, topped with the Rathausmann statue, features an illuminated clock face. The facade is intricately decorated with pointed arches, stone tracery, and multiple smaller spires. In the foreground, a large, brightly lit Christmas tree stands to the left, and several wooden stalls from the Christkindlmarkt (Christmas market) are visible, crowded with people. The building is bathed in warm yellow light, contrasting sharply with the dark night sky.

details.description: A night photograph, rotated 90 degrees counter-clockwise, capturing the illuminated façade of the Vienna City Hall (Wiener Rathaus) in Vienna, Austria. The image showcases the building's magnificent Gothic Revival architecture, characterized by a soaring central tower with a clock face, intricate spires, pointed arches, and elaborate stone tracery. The façade is bathed in warm artificial light against a stark black sky. In the foreground (appearing on the right side due to rotation), a large Christmas tree is decorated with bright white lights, and the roofs of wooden market stalls are visible, indicating the presence of the annual Christkindlmarkt (Christmas Market) on the Rathausplatz. The scene conveys a festive and majestic atmosphere.

details.description: A night photograph of the Wiener Rathaus (Vienna City Hall) in Austria, showcasing its elaborate Neo-Gothic architecture. The building is brightly illuminated, highlighting its central clock tower, multiple spires, and intricate stone tracery. In the foreground, a large, densely lit Christmas tree stands to the left, while the right side of the frame shows the wooden stalls and crowds of the Christkindlmarkt (Christmas Market). The sky is pitch black, providing a sharp contrast to the warm glow of the building and festive lights.
